objective:
[Scalp de continuation / micro-retournement] sur [crypto liquide] [5m ou 15m].
Indicateurs : [EMA 9/21/50] + [RSI 14] + [Bandes de Bollinger 20,2].
Entrées : [pullback vers EMA 21 avec RSI repartant dans le sens de la micro-tendance et rejet d’une bande] / [excès sur bande externe avec RSI en surachat/survente et signal de retournement court terme].
Sorties : [take-profit sur extension vers bande opposée ou prochain niveau de structure] / [sortie anticipée si clôture franche contre la position ou divergence RSI].
Risk management : [stop-loss sous dernier plus bas/haut local ou 1× ATR] / [ratio minimum 1,5] / [risque fixe 1–2 % du capital par trade].

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy aims to capture scalp trades by identifying pullbacks to the 21-period EMA with RSI confirming strength and a rejection off Bollinger Bands. The combination of these indicators should filter high-quality signals with low noise, allowing for quick entries and exits to capitalize on short-term price movements.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy combines EMA for trend direction, RSI for overbought/oversold conditions, and Bollinger Bands for volatility analysis. The idea is to enter when price pulls back to a key EMA level with RSI indicating potential reversal, and exit when price reaches the opposite band or shows divergence.
